name: io.github.PromptExecution/ledgerr-mcp
title: l3dg3rr Tax Ledger
description: Local-first U.S. expat tax document intelligence MCP server. Ingests PDF statements, classifies transactions, and produces CPA-auditable Excel workbooks — no data leaves your machine.

environmentVariables.name: LEDGERR_WORKBOOK_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Path to the Excel workbook (default: tax-ledger.xlsx in CWD)

environmentVariables.name: LEDGER_PDF_INBOX
environmentVariables.description: Directory watched for incoming PDF statements
